I want to generate an annual report of income and expenses,
so that I can evaluate my financial performance throughout the year and plan for the upcoming year.
column3:
Scenario: Generate annual report of income and expenses
  Given a senior citizen with recorded income and expenses for the year
  When the senior citizen requests to generate an annual report
  Then the system generates a report of income and expenses for the year
  And the report shows the financial performance throughout the year

column2:
User Story 15: Financial Charts
● User Story: As a senior citizen,
I want to view charts of income, expenses, and balances,
so that I can quickly understand my financial situation in a visual
and intuitive way.
column3:
Scenario: Senior citizen views financial charts
  Given a senior citizen is logged into the financial dashboard
  When the senior citizen navigates to the charts section
  Then the senior citizen should see charts of income, expenses, and balances
  And the charts should be visual and intuitive

column2:
User Story 16: Consulting FAQs
● User Story: As a senior,
I want to consult a list of frequently asked questions (FAQs),
so that I can resolve common questions without needing additional support.
column3:
Scenario: Senior consults FAQs to resolve common questions
  Given a senior user is on the FAQ page
  When the senior user views the list of frequently asked questions
  Then the senior user should see answers to common questions
  And the senior user should be able to resolve common questions without additional support

column2:
User Story 17: Recover Password
● User Story: As a senior citizen,
I want to recover my password,
So that I can access my account again if I forget my credentials.
column3:
Scenario: Recover password for senior citizen
  Given a senior citizen has forgotten their password
  And the senior citizen is on the login page
  When the senior citizen clicks on the "Forgot Password" link
  Then the senior citizen should be prompted to enter their email address
  And the senior citizen should receive a password recovery email

column2:
User Story 18: System Accessibility
● User Story: As a senior citizen with low vision,
I want to be able to increase the font size in the system,
so that I can read financial information clearly and comfortably.
column3:
Scenario: Increase font size for better readability
  Given a senior citizen with low vision is logged into the system
  When the user increases the font size
  Then the financial information should be displayed in a larger font
  And the user should be able to read the information clearly and comfortably

column2:
User Story 19: Personalizing Notifications
● User Story: As a senior,
I want to personalize the notifications I receive,
so that I only receive the reminders and alerts that are important to me.
column3:
Scenario: Senior personalizes notifications to receive important reminders and alerts
  Given a senior user is logged into their account
  And the user navigates to the notification settings page
  When the user selects the types of notifications they want to receive
  Then the user should only receive the selected types of reminders and alerts

column2:
User Story 20: Exporting Reports
● User Story: As a senior citizen,
I want to export my financial reports in formats such as PDF or Excel,
So that I can share my financial information with family members or advisors.
column3:
Scenario: Export financial reports in PDF or Excel format
  Given a senior citizen with financial reports
  When the senior citizen exports the reports in PDF or Excel format
  Then the reports should be available in the selected format
  And the senior citizen can share the reports with family members or advisors

column2:
User Story 1: New User Registration
● User Story: As a senior citizen, I want to register a new user, so that
I can access the personal finance management system.
column3:
Scenario: Senior citizen registers a new user
  Given a senior citizen is on the registration page
  When they fill in the required registration details
  And they submit the registration form
  Then the new user account should be created
  And the senior citizen should be able to access the personal finance management system

column2:
User Story 2: Login
● User Story: As a senior citizen, I want to log in to the system, so that I can access my profile and finances.
column3:
Scenario: Senior citizen logs in to access profile and finances
  Given a senior citizen is on the login page
  When the senior citizen enters valid credentials
  And clicks the login button
  Then the senior citizen should be redirected to their profile page
  And the senior citizen should see their financial information

column2:
User Story 3: Logout
● User Story: As a senior citizen, I want to log out of the system, So that I can log out of my account safely.
column3:
Scenario: Senior citizen logs out of the system
  Given the senior citizen is logged into the system
  When the senior citizen clicks the logout button
  Then the senior citizen should be logged out of the system
  And the login page should be displayed

column2:
User Story 4: Create Custom Profile
● User Story: As a senior citizen, I want to create a custom profile, so that I can manage my finances according to my needs.
column3:
Scenario: Senior citizen creates a custom profile to manage finances
  Given a senior citizen is on the profile creation page
  When the senior citizen enters their personal information
  And the senior citizen selects custom financial preferences
  And the senior citizen submits the profile form
  Then the custom profile should be created
  And the senior citizen should see a confirmation message

column2:
User Story 5: Adding Income
● User Story: As a senior citizen, I want to add income to the system, so that I can track my monthly earnings.
column3:
Scenario: Adding income to track monthly earnings
  Given a senior citizen is logged into the system
  And the income section is accessible
  When the senior citizen adds a new income entry
  Then the income should be recorded in the system
  And the monthly earnings should be updated

column2:
User Story 6: Editing Recipes
● User Story: As a senior citizen, I want to edit existing recipes, so that
I can correct information or adjust values.
column3:
Scenario: Senior citizen edits an existing recipe
  Given a senior citizen is logged into the recipe application
  And the senior citizen has an existing recipe
  When the senior citizen edits the recipe
  Then the recipe should be updated with the new information

column2:
User Story 7: Deleting Recipes
● User Story: As a senior citizen, I want to delete recipes, so that I can
remove outdated or incorrect entries.
column3:
Scenario: Deleting a recipe
  Given a senior citizen is logged into the recipe management system
  And the senior citizen has a list of saved recipes
  When the senior citizen deletes a recipe
  Then the recipe should be removed from the list of saved recipes

column2:
User Story 8: Adding Expenses
● User Story: As a senior citizen, I want to add expenses to the system, so that I can monitor my monthly spending.
column3:
Scenario: Senior citizen adds an expense to monitor monthly spending
  Given a senior citizen is logged into the expense tracking system
  And the senior citizen is on the "Add Expense" page
  When the senior citizen enters the expense details and submits the form
  Then the expense should be added to the system
  And the senior citizen should see the updated list of expenses

column2:
User Story 9: Editing Expenses
● User Story: As a senior, I want to edit existing expenses, so that
I can correct information or adjust amounts.
column3:
Scenario: Senior edits an existing expense
  Given a senior has logged into the expense management system
  And the senior has an existing expense entry
  When the senior edits the expense entry
  Then the expense entry should be updated with the new information
  And the updated expense should be saved in the system

column2:
User Story 10: Deleting Expenses
● User Story: As a senior citizen, I want to delete expenses, so that I can remove entries that are no longer relevant.
column3:
Scenario: Senior citizen deletes an expense
  Given a senior citizen is logged into the expense management system
  And the senior citizen has an existing expense entry
  When the senior citizen deletes the expense entry
  Then the expense entry should be removed from the list of expenses
  And the total expense amount should be updated accordingly

column2:
User Story 11: Expense Categorization
● User Story: As a senior citizen, I want to categorize my expenses, so that I can better understand where I am spending my money.
column3:
Scenario: Categorize expenses to understand spending
  Given a senior citizen with a list of expenses
  When the senior citizen categorizes the expenses
  Then the expenses should be grouped by category
  And the senior citizen should see a summary of spending by category

column2:
User Story 12: Setting Savings Goals
● User Story: As a senior, I want to set savings goals, so that
I can better plan my spending and save more.
column3:
Scenario: Senior sets a savings goal
  Given a senior is logged into their account
  And the senior is on the savings goals page
  When the senior sets a new savings goal
  Then the savings goal should be saved
  And the senior should see a confirmation message

column2:
User Story 13: Payment Alerts
● User Story: As a senior citizen, I want to receive payment alerts, so that I don’t miss due dates and avoid fines.
column3:
Scenario: Senior citizen receives payment alerts to avoid missing due dates
  Given a senior citizen is registered for payment alerts
  And the senior citizen has an upcoming payment due
  When the payment due date is approaching
  Then the senior citizen should receive a payment alert
  And the alert should include the due date and amount due

column2:
User Story 14: Generating Monthly Reports
● User Story: As a senior citizen, I want to generate monthly income and expense reports, so that I can analyze my financial situation over time.
column3:
Scenario: Generating monthly income and expense reports
  Given a senior citizen with financial data for the month
  When the senior citizen generates the monthly report
  Then the monthly income and expense report should be created
  And the report should display the financial situation over time

column2:
User Story 15: Generating Annual Reports
● User Story: As a senior citizen, I want to generate annual income and expense reports, so that I can have an overview of my finances throughout the year.
column3:
Scenario: Generating annual income and expense reports
  Given a senior citizen with financial data for the year
  When the senior citizen generates the annual report
  Then the annual income and expense report should be created
  And the report should provide an overview of finances throughout the year

column1: User Story 16: Income and Expense Charts
column2:
User Story 16: Income and Expense Charts
● User Story: As a senior citizen, I want to view income and expense charts, so I can quickly understand my financial health.
column3:
Scenario: View income and expense charts
  Given a senior citizen is logged into the financial application
  When the senior citizen navigates to the income and expense charts section
  Then the senior citizen should see a chart displaying income and expenses
  And the chart should clearly show the financial health

column2:
User Story 17: Access to FAQs
● User Story: As a senior citizen, I want to access a FAQ section, so that I can find answers to common questions about using the system.
column3:
Scenario: Senior citizen accesses FAQ section
  Given a senior citizen is on the homepage
  When the senior citizen navigates to the FAQ section
  Then the FAQ section should be displayed
  And the senior citizen should see answers to common questions about using the system
